title: Global Fishing Watch — AIS Apparent Fishing Effort, Saudi Arabia EEZ (2012–2025)
abstract: Gridded, low-spatial-resolution daily apparent fishing hours derived from AIS vessel tracking, aggregated by flag state and (intended) gear type within the Saudi Arabia EEZ region, downloaded via the gfwr R client per the accompanying processing script (GFW.R). Covers both the Red Sea and Arabian Gulf coasts of Saudi Arabia.

spatial.resolution: low (~0.1° grid cells, GFW 'LOW' spatial_resolution setting)

variables.name: Time Range
variables.label: Date
variables.description: Date of the observation (daily temporal resolution).

variables.name: Flag
variables.label: Flag State
variables.description: Flag state of the vessel(s) contributing fishing hours to this cell/date.

variables.name: Geartype
variables.label: Gear Type
variables.description: Intended gear-type grouping; empty ('NA') for all rows in this extract (see known_issues).

variables.name: Vessel IDs
variables.label: Contributing Vessel Count
variables.description: Count of unique vessels contributing to this grid cell/date/flag combination — not a vessel identifier or name (documented inline in GFW.R).

variables.name: Apparent Fishing Hours
variables.label: Apparent Fishing Hours
variables.description: AIS-derived apparent fishing effort aggregated for the cell/date/flag combination.

access.how_to_request: Global Fishing Watch public fishing-effort data is freely downloadable/queryable (globalfishingwatch.org/data-download); this specific extract was pulled via the gfwr R package (see GFW.R) and is available locally without request.

known_issues: The Geartype column is empty ('NA') for every row in this extract, even though the processing script (GFW.R) requested group_by = 'FLAGANDGEARTYPE'; gear-type breakdowns are not usable from this file as-is.
'Vessel IDs' is a count of unique contributing vessels, not an actual vessel identifier — explicitly noted as a gotcha in GFW.R's inline comments.

Coverage is the full Saudi Arabia EEZ (GFW EEZ region code 'SAU'), which spans both the Red Sea and Arabian Gulf coasts (observed longitude range 34.5-51.6°E, latitude 16.4-29.4°N); records east of roughly 42-43°E fall in the Arabian Gulf, not the Red Sea, and should be filtered out (e.g. by bbox or by geometry) for Red-Sea-specific analyses.
Low spatial resolution ('LOW' setting in the gfwr query) — coordinates are coarse grid-cell centroids, not vessel tracks.
This is a static, point-in-time extract (per GFW.R, pulled through 2026-03-27 request date, with data present through Nov 2025); it will not reflect more recent activity unless the script is rerun.
License terms for redistribution were not verified locally; consult Global Fishing Watch's data-download terms before further use/sharing.
